question: Which population segment holds the largest share in the final year shown?

options.A: Segment A has the largest share.
options.B: Segment C has the largest share.
options.C: Segment B has the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which segment has the largest share without a legend to explain the color coding.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
